ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crop (e.g., Wheat) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of crop (e.g., cereal, vegetable) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the crop based on production efficiency */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the crop */,
  "optimal_water_usage" REAL /* Optimal amount of water required for the crop */,
  "optimal_temperature" REAL /* Optimal temperature range for the crop */,
  "growth_period" INTEGER /* Typical growth period of the crop in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_data" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop being produced */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the crop is grown */,
  "water_usage" REAL /* Amount of water used for irrigation */,
  "area_cultivated" INTEGER /* Area of land cultivated (in hectares) */,
  "production_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of crop produced (in tons) */,
  "visited" INTEGER /* Number of visits recorded for monitoring */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the production data was recorded */,
  "season" TEXT /* Agricultural season (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date when the crop was harvested */,
  "pest_infestation" INTEGER /* Whether there was any significant pest infestation */,
  "disease_outbreak" INTEGER /* Whether there was any significant disease outbreak */,
  "fertilizer_used" TEXT /* Type of fertilizer used */,
  "irrigation_method" TEXT /* Method of irrigation used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Typical climate type of the city */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the city in meters */,
  "average_rainfall" REAL /* Average annual rainfall in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water resource */,
  "water_source" TEXT /* Type of water source (e.g., river, well, reservoir) */,
  "total_available" REAL /* Total water available (in cubic meters) */,
  "current_usage" REAL /* Current water usage (in cubic meters) */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the water resource is located */,
  "renewal_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the water resource is renewed */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the water */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_resources_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agricultural_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit record */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production record being monitored */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations made during the visit */,
  "visitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the visit */,
  "visitor_role" TEXT /* Role of the visitor */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the visit */,
  "soil_condition" TEXT /* Soil condition during the visit */,
  "pest_control" INTEGER /* Whether any pest control measures were taken */,
  "disease_control" INTEGER /* Whether any disease control measures were taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_visits_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES production_data ("production_id")
)
